neqsim.thermo.util.amines.AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType

Description
neqsim.thermo.util.amines
 

  • Uses of AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType in neqsim.thermo.util.amines

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType
    AmineSystem.mapToKentEisenbergType()
    Maps the configured amine type to the AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType used by the solubility correlation.
    static AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType
    AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType[]
    AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in neqsim.thermo.util.amines with parameters of type AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static double
    AmineKentEisenberg.kAmine(AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType type, double temperatureK)
    Apparent amine protonation (dissociation) constant, AmineH+ = Amine + H+.
    private static double
    AmineKentEisenberg.kCarbamate(AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType type, double temperatureK)
    Apparent carbamate reversion constant, AmineCOO- + H2O = Amine + HCO3-.
    static double
    AmineKentEisenberg.partialPressureCO2Bara(AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType type, double temperatureK, double amineMolarity, double loading)
    Calculates the equilibrium CO2 partial pressure over a loaded amine solution.
    private static double
    AmineKentEisenberg.solveCarbamate(AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType type, double temperatureK, double amineMolarity, double loading)
    Solves the speciation for a primary or secondary amine (MEA, DEA) including carbamate.
    private static double
    AmineKentEisenberg.solveTertiary(AmineKentEisenberg.AmineType type, double temperatureK, double amineMolarity, double loading)
    Solves the speciation for a tertiary amine (MDEA, no carbamate).
